items.summary: A JAPAN supporter was filmed "crashing out" after the nation was eliminated from the World Cup in dramatic fashion. items.title: Kane will sign new Bayern deal - Tuesday's gossip
items.summary: Harry Kane will extend his Bayern Munich contract, Manchester City plan major rebuild, while Rayo Vallecano left-back Pep Chavarria is a target for Chelsea.

items.title: Roy Keane swallows pride and changes his mind on Brazil World Cup star Casemiro after brutal half-time analysis on ITV
items.summary: ROY KEANE was forced to perform a major U-turn on Casemiro during Brazil's clash with Japan. The Brazilian midfielder was the subject of ridicule by many associated with Manchester United during his Old Trafford stay. items.title: Man Utd star Matheus Cunha slammed for ‘disrespectful’ gesture after Brazil’s World Cup win over Japan
items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED star Matheus Cunha was slammed for a "disrespectful" gesture straight after Brazil's World Cup win over Japan. Arsenal's Gabriel Martinelli snatched a last-gasp winner in the SIXTH minute of added time in the last 32. It broke Japanese hearts with players and fans alike devastated.

items.title: Aston Villa ‘slap British record transfer fee on Morgan Rogers’ with Arsenal leading Man Utd and Chelsea in race
items.summary: ASTON VILLA have slapped a British record transfer fee on Morgan Rogers to ward off interest from Arsenal, it's been claimed. items.title: Gardner: Australia must be wary of Matthews in T20 World Cup semi-final
items.summary: Ashleigh Gardner says Australia must be cautious of a dangerous West Indies side containing Hayley Matthews and Deandra Dottin as they prepare for the first ICC Women's T20 World Cup semi-final at The Oval on Tuesday, live on Sky Sports.

items.title: 90+5! Martinelli sends Brazil through in comeback win vs Japan
items.summary: Gabriel Martinelli's 95th-minute winner saw Brazil dramatically come from behind to win 2-1 and advance to the World Cup last 16, cruelly denying Japan a first-ever knockout stage victory in the competition.

items.title: Martinelli scores stoppage-time winner to send Brazil through to last 16
items.summary: Gabriel Martinelli scores a dramatic 95th-minute winner with Brazil coming from behind to beat Japan, set up a World Cup last-16 tie against Norway or Ivory Coast.

items.title: Bournemouth reject Arsenal interest in Scott
items.summary: Bournemouth reject an enquiry from Arsenal for Alex Scott and say the midfielder is not for sale this summer.

items.title: Arsenal fail in transfer bid for Alex Scott as they battle Man Utd and Chelsea for Bournemouth midfielder
items.summary: BOURNEMOUTH have allegedly rejected Arsenal's approach for midfielder Alex Scott. The Gunners are pushing to sign a new central midfielder ahead of the 2026/27 campaign as they look to retain the Premier League title. items.title: 'How seriously are you taking penalties?' | Madueke: I'm always ready
items.summary: A reporter asks Noni Madueke how seriously England are taking penalties as the side move to the knockout stage of the World Cup - facing DR Congo on Wednesday.

items.title: Lewandowski joins MLS side Chicago Fire until 2028
items.summary: Former Barcelona striker Robert Lewandowski joins Major League Soccer side Chicago Fire on a two-year deal.

items.title: Black Lace re-release ‘Do The Conga’ with Jude Bellingham lyrics ahead of England’s World Cup clash with DR Congo
items.summary: MILLIONS of England fans will bunk off work early to watch their World Cup last 32 clash — and pop legends Black Lace urge the Three Lions to “Do The Congo”. Inspired by our front page with Jude Bellingham lyrics, the lads have rewritten their Do The Conga party anthem and recorded a new version....
